info.title: Hevo Data
info.description:
Hevo Data APIs allow users to manage their Pipelines in Hevo.

API Key and API Secret can be generated from `Account` > `API Keys` on Hevo UI.
The key and secret generated should be used as Basic auth username and password to authenticate access.

404.description: Destination is not found. Provide a valid destination ID.

400.description: Pipeline with given name already exists.

409.description: Pipeline is already in the given state.

400.description: Pipeline position is defined for log-based pipelines only.
Schedule is not configurable for Pipeline.

404.description: Schedule frequency must be within minimum and maximum frequency allowed for the Pipeline.

400.description: Transformation code can only be fetched for script based transformations.
Error encountered in evaluating the transformation script.
